name: NeRDS (MinBZK)
description_en: Fourteen Agent Skills covering Dutch government guidelines — accessibility, privacy, security, procurement, algorithms, and sustainability.

name: kvk-connect (MinBZK)
description_en: Lets an AI assistant query a ministry-run mirror of KVK company profiles, history, and search data.

name: Rijksmuseum MCP
description_en: Lets an AI assistant search and browse the Rijksmuseum's art collection.

name: OpenTK MCP
description_en: Lets an AI assistant query Tweede Kamer (Dutch parliament) debates, motions, and documents.

name: cbsodata
description_en: Lets a script or agent query CBS (Statistics Netherlands) StatLine open data tables.
